Design

Building a Modern Blog with Next.js and Sanity CMS

By Kiara•Feb 2, 2026

Introduction

Building a blog today is no longer about just writing articles. It is about creating a fast, scalable, and beautifully structured content system that works seamlessly with modern web technologies.

In this post, I’ll share how I built a modern blog using Next.js and Sanity CMS — a powerful combination for developers who want full control over the frontend while enjoying an excellent content editing experience.

Why Not Traditional CMS?

Traditional CMS platforms tightly couple the frontend and backend, which limits flexibility and performance. As developers, we want:

  • Complete control over UI
  • Fast performance
  • Scalable architecture
  • Clean content structure

This is where headless CMS comes in.

What is Sanity CMS?

Sanity is a headless CMS that allows you to define your content structure using schemas and fetch it into any frontend using APIs.

This means:

  • Content lives in Sanity
  • UI lives in Next.js
  • Both work independently and beautifully together

Setting Up the Blog Structure

The first step was creating structured content models:

  • Author
  • Categories
  • Posts

This helps in organizing content and displaying it cleanly across the blog.

Writing Content with Portable Text

Sanity’s editor allows rich text formatting, images, headings, lists, and more directly inside the content area. This makes writing posts intuitive and powerful without touching code.

Fetching Posts into Next.js

Using Sanity’s API, blog posts can be fetched into Next.js pages dynamically. Each post gets its own slug-based URL like:

/blog/building-a-modern-blog-with-nextjs-and-sanity-cms

This allows for SEO-friendly and dynamic routing.

Benefits of This Architecture

  • Blazing fast performance
  • Clean separation of content and code
  • Easy to scale into marketing pages or documentation
  • Perfect for SaaS and modern web apps

Conclusion

Combining Next.js with Sanity CMS is one of the best ways to build a future-proof blog. It gives developers flexibility and content creators a smooth writing experience.

This is just the beginning. From here, this blog can grow into a complete content platform.

VIBISHA.
